## Related Issues

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the one that applies: -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New renderer data (adding or updating renderer JSON)
- [ ] Benchmark data (adding benchmark results)
- [ ] Documentation (changes to docs, README, guides)
- [ ] Chore / Infrastructure (CI, configs, dependencies)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist

<!-- Check all that apply. Not all items will apply to every PR. -->

### General
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have added comments where the code is complex or non-obvious

### For code changes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds without errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes without warnings
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

### For renderer data changes
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_data.py` passes without errors
- [ ] All required schema fields are populated
- [ ] Descriptions are factual, balanced, and spell-checked
- [ ] Source links (repository, homepage, paper) are valid URLs

### For benchmark submissions
- [ ] Hardware specifications are included
- [ ] Renderer version and commit hash are documented
- [ ] Results file conforms to the benchmark schema
- [ ] Multiple runs were performed to verify consistency
